'''Harvos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] from [[Rokrul]] [[City/Legends|village]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Confederacy-aligned [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]] built a [[Techno Union laboratory|laboratory]] on Nelvaan that drained the planet of geothermal energy, causing a perpetual winter. Harvos was sent to investigate the cause of the shift in climate, but was captured by the Techno Union and mutated into a super soldier for their purposes. He was freed by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during his transformation and helped [[Battle of Nelvaan|destroy]] the Techno Union's base.

==Biography==
===Harvos, the warrior===
[[File:BattleofNelvaan2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Mutant Harvos with Anakin Skywalker]]
Harvos<ref name="Nelvaanian">{{DB|species|nelvaanian|Nelvaanian}}</ref> was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]] [[Soldier|warrior]] from<ref name="CW24" /> [[Rokrul]]<ref name="DBNelvaan">{{DB|location|nelvaan|Nelvaan}}</ref> [[City/Legends|village]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]]<ref name="CW24" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Sometime during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the [[Techno Union]], allied with the Confederacy, constructed a [[Techno Union laboratory|laboratory]] on Nelvaan that drained the planet of geothermal energy.<ref name="DBNelvaan" /> Harvos, along with all the male warriors from Rokrul, was sent to investigate what was causing the planet's new indefinite winter, as the [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Orvos]] saw the change as a sickness befalling their [[Great Mother]] [[Deity/Legends|deity]].<ref name="CW23">{{CW|23}}</ref>

===Captured by the Techno Union===
Harvos was captured by [[battle droid]]s and brought to the Techno Union laboratory where [[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] altered his body genetically and implanted strange forms of technology.<ref name="CSWEHarvos">{{CSWECite|II|24|Harvos}}</ref> He was placed in a tank filled with [[3L41UH7 serum|3L41UH7 mutagenic serum]]<ref name="Skyewalkers">''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]''</ref>, and his body grew in size until his appearance differed significantly from that of his former self. During his transformation, the base was infiltrated by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].<ref name="CW24" /> The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] freed Harvos and his fellow warriors, though the men initially turned to attack Skywalker due to the mind control devices implanted on them. Subsequently after he and Skywalker destroyed the devices, Harvos reminded his comrades and brothers that anybody who would help free them could not be their enemy, and the warriors turned their rage toward their Skakoan captors, in turn helping Skywalker [[Battle of Nelvaan|destroy]] the base. Harvos also instructed Skywalker into reaching the central battery of the base, and destroy the crystal powering it up.<ref name="CSWEHarvos" />

[[File:CW_Chapter_25.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The warriors return home.]]
After the base was destroyed, Harvos and the other males returned to Rokrul village with Skywalker, and although initially met with hesitation and shock from their female counterparts due to their mutated appearance, a child (presumably Harvos's child) approached the men without fear, and the females had a quick change of heart, moving in to embrace their long lost loved ones. The village then celebrated their return with dancing and a bonfire.<ref name="CW25">{{CW|25}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Harvos was able to remain calm and coherent, even after being mostly mutated, and was able to convince his fellow warriors to turn their anger away from their liberator and toward their captors. He felt they were first Nelvaanians, and that anyone who helped them was not their enemy.<ref name="CSWEHarvos" /> Like his fellow Nelvaanians, he had [[Color/Legends|gray]]-blue skin with black [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and he sported black tattoos on his upper torso.<ref name="CW24" /> Prior to his mutation, he had a small body,<ref name="CSWEHarvos" /> but his alterations caused his body to grow immensely, the top of his head to bald, his front teeth to protrude from his mouth, and his tattoos to disappear.<ref name="CW24" />

==Behind the scenes==
Harvos made his first appearance in [[Chapter 24 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 24]] of the animated ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' microseries,<ref name="CW24" /> which aired on [[March 24]], [[2005]] on [[Cartoon Network]].<ref name="TV.com">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-xxiv-370296|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 2, Episode 4: Chapter XXIV}}</ref> The character was voiced by [[Richard McGonagle]].<ref name="casting">{{WebCite|url=https://www.behindthevoiceactors.com/Richard-McGonagle|text=Richard McGonagle - 113 Character Images|archivedate=20181115210651}}</ref> He was first named in the "Nelvaanian" [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="Nelvaanian" />
